note: KNN centroids from Kaggle Crop Recommendation dataset (Phase 3 lookup — no browser retrain)

centroids.label: Rice
centroids.reason: High rainfall and humidity suit paddy cultivation.

centroids.reason: Short-duration pulse for warm, drier windows.

centroids.label: Lentil

centroids.label: Mango

centroids.label: Grapes

centroids.label: Watermelon
